title: Cricket in India
description: A tougher India-focused cricket round with iconic records, venues, domestic cricket, and defining match moments.

questions.prompt: Which Indian batter scored 281 in the 2001 Kolkata Test against Australia?
questions.hint: He was known for elegant wristwork and batted at No. 3 in that innings.

questions.prompt: Which Indian bowler took all 10 wickets in a Test innings against Pakistan in Delhi in 1999?
questions.hint: He was nicknamed Jumbo.

questions.prompt: At which ground did India win the inaugural T20 World Cup final in 2007?
questions.hint: The venue was in Johannesburg.

questions.prompt: Which Indian batter scored a century at Lord's in the 2014 Test that India won?
questions.hint: He later captained India to a famous series win in Australia.

questions.prompt: Who was the captain of India when they won the ICC Champions Trophy in 2013?
questions.hint: He also captained India to the 2007 T20 World Cup and 2011 ODI World Cup.

questions.prompt: Which Indian city is home to the Wankhede Stadium?
questions.hint: It is the capital of Maharashtra.

questions.prompt: Who scored the winning runs for India in the 2002 NatWest final at Lord's?
questions.hint: He later became one of India's best limited-overs all-rounders.

questions.prompt: Which Indian opener scored a triple century against Pakistan in Multan in 2004?
questions.hint: He was famous for fearless strokeplay.

questions.prompt: What is the domestic first-class championship of India called?
questions.hint: It is named after a former ruler of Nawanagar.

questions.prompt: Which India spinner was called the Turbanator?
questions.hint: He dismissed Ricky Ponting many times.

questions.prompt: Who was India's coach during the 2011 ODI World Cup win?
questions.hint: He was a South African batter with the nickname Gary.

questions.prompt: Which Indian bowler took a hat-trick in the 2019 World Cup against Afghanistan?
questions.hint: He is a fast bowler known for yorkers.

questions.prompt: Which Indian cricketer became the first man to score a double century in ODI cricket?
questions.hint: He achieved it in Gwalior against South Africa.

questions.prompt: Which stadium in Ahmedabad hosted the 2023 ODI World Cup final?
questions.hint: It is the largest cricket stadium in the world.

questions.prompt: Who captained India in the famous tied Test against Australia at Madras in 1986?
questions.hint: He was a world-class all-rounder from Kapurthala.

questions.prompt: Which Indian all-rounder was Player of the Tournament in the 2011 ODI World Cup?
questions.hint: He fought cancer soon after that tournament.

questions.prompt: Which Indian batter scored 183 against Sri Lanka in the 2005 Jaipur ODI, then his highest ODI score?
questions.hint: He later became one of India's greatest captains.

questions.prompt: Which city is home to Eden Gardens?
questions.hint: It is sometimes called the City of Joy.

questions.prompt: Who was the first Indian to take 500 wickets in Test cricket?
questions.hint: He reached the mark against England in Mohali in 2008.

questions.prompt: Which Indian batter made 264, the highest individual ODI score by a man as of 2026?
questions.hint: He is nicknamed the Hitman.

questions.prompt: What is the name of India's premier domestic one-day tournament?
questions.hint: It is named after the first Indian Test captain.

questions.prompt: Which Indian batter was called the Wall?
questions.hint: He later became head coach of India.

questions.prompt: Who hit the winning six in the 2011 ODI World Cup final?
questions.hint: He was India's captain that night in Mumbai.

questions.prompt: Which Indian fast bowler took 6 for 23 in the 2003 World Cup match against Pakistan at Centurion?
questions.hint: He shared his first name with a famous tennis player.

questions.prompt: Which IPL franchise was suspended for two seasons along with Chennai Super Kings?
questions.hint: It was the Pune-based team owned by Sahara.

questions.prompt: Which Indian spinner dismissed Ponting, Hayden, Gilchrist, and others in the 2001 Border-Gavaskar series?
questions.hint: He took a hat-trick in the Kolkata Test.

questions.prompt: Which Indian cricketer was known as the Little Master before Sachin was nicknamed the Master Blaster?
questions.hint: He was Sunil Gavaskar.

questions.prompt: Which Indian batter was the first to score centuries in all three formats of international cricket?
questions.hint: He is from Delhi and captained India in all formats.

questions.prompt: Who captained India during the 1985 Benson and Hedges World Championship of Cricket win?
questions.hint: The title was won in Australia.

questions.prompt: Which ground in Chennai was formerly known as the Madras Cricket Club Ground?
questions.hint: It is commonly called Chepauk.

questions.prompt: Who was the first Indian woman to score a double century in ODI cricket?
questions.hint: She captained India and is from Hyderabad.

questions.prompt: Which Indian all-rounder scored 175 not out against Zimbabwe in the 1983 World Cup?
questions.hint: The innings came at Tunbridge Wells.

questions.prompt: Which Indian fast bowler is nicknamed Bhuvi?
questions.hint: He is known for swing with the new ball.

questions.prompt: Which Indian state team has won the most Ranji Trophy titles?
questions.hint: Its home city includes the Wankhede Stadium.

questions.prompt: Who was the first Indian batter to score a century in T20 Internationals?
questions.hint: He did it against South Africa in Johannesburg in 2010.

questions.prompt: Which Indian batter holds the record for the fastest ODI hundred by an Indian as of 2026?
questions.hint: He scored it off 52 balls against Australia in Jaipur.

questions.prompt: Which Indian batter won the Orange Cap in the very first IPL season in 2008?
questions.hint: He played for Kings XI Punjab.

questions.prompt: Who led India to their first Test series win in Australia in 2018-19?
questions.hint: He is often called King Kohli.

questions.prompt: Which Indian seamer won Player of the Series when India beat Australia 2-1 in the 2017 Border-Gavaskar Trophy at home?
questions.hint: He is known for his upright seam position and currently also serves as a commentator at times.

questions.prompt: What is the name of the domestic T20 tournament played among Indian state teams?
questions.hint: It is named after a former BCCI secretary.

questions.prompt: Which Indian opener scored 146 at The Oval in 1979 while chasing 438?
questions.hint: He was one of the greatest Test openers of all time.

questions.prompt: Who took the catch to dismiss Misbah-ul-Haq at the end of the 2007 T20 World Cup final?
questions.hint: He was fielding at short fine leg.

questions.prompt: Which Indian spinner became the fastest Indian to 250 Test wickets in terms of innings?
questions.hint: He is an off-spinner from Chennai who bowls the carrom ball too.

questions.prompt: Which Indian batter was the top scorer for India in the 1983 World Cup final?
questions.hint: He made 38 at Lord's.

questions.prompt: Which cricketer captained Chennai Super Kings to five IPL titles by 2023?
questions.hint: He is known as Captain Cool.

questions.prompt: Which Indian seamer dismissed Brian Lara with the very first ball of a Test match in 1994 at Mohali?
questions.hint: He later became a noted commentator and swing expert.

questions.prompt: Which Indian player was Player of the Match in the 2007 T20 World Cup final?
questions.hint: He played a vital all-round role and took a catch in the deep.

questions.prompt: Which Indian wicketkeeper became the first from the country to score a Test double century, doing so against Pakistan in Faisalabad in 2006?
questions.hint: He was known for aggressive strokeplay and often batted in the middle order.

questions.prompt: Which Indian batter scored 161 at Cape Town in 1997, an innings remembered as one of India's finest overseas knocks of the era?
questions.hint: He was nicknamed the Little Master and also opened the batting.

questions.prompt: Which former Indian captain is associated with the phrase 'Tiger of Patudi'?
questions.hint: His initials are M. A. K.
